overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Elden Ring showing a character in ornate golden armor walking through the floating ruins of Crumbling Farum Azula. The environment features ancient stone architecture, a massive celestial white tree visible in the sky, and red embers drifting down through the twilight atmosphere.

tall ancient stone pillar topped with a ceremonial urn
tall ancient stone pillar topped with a ceremonial urn
crumbling ancient stone walls lining the pathway

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide stone pathway flanked by ancient urn-topped pillars. The massive celestial white tree dominates the sky ahead while red embers drift down through the clear twilight air.

scene_state.functional_zone: ruined pathway with encroaching dead trees and exposed roots

events.description: ground becomes increasingly broken with large root systems breaking through the stone tiles

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through deteriorating terrain with large dead trees appearing on the left

massive twisted tree roots breaking through the stone pavement
collapsed stone archway structure among the ruins
circular patterned stone platform with geometric carvings

segments.scene_description: The path deteriorates into broken tiles with massive dead trees on the left and twisted root systems encroaching from the right. The urn pillars pass out of view as the character approaches a more overgrown section of the ruins.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular platform area with ancient statues and scattered ruins

events.description: entering area with circular stone platforms and ancient statues

agents.ego_description: walking across circular stone platforms surrounded by ancient statues and dead woodland

entered.detail: weathered stone statues and pillars scattered among the ruins
gnarled dead tree with exposed roots growing on a stone mound

segments.scene_description: The character traverses circular stone platforms surrounded by ancient statues and twisted dead trees. The celestial tree shifts toward the right as the path curves, revealing more of the crumbling architecture ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through the floating ruins of Farum Azula, transitioning from a structured stone promenade into an overgrown, decaying wasteland. It begins with the character walking along a wide stone pathway flanked by urn-topped pillars, while red embers drift through the twilight air beneath a massive celestial white tree. As the path deteriorates into broken tiles, the pillars fade from view and are replaced by massive dead trees and twisted root systems encroaching from the sides. The scene then shifts to a series of circular stone platforms surrounded by ancient statues, where the path curves to move the celestial tree toward the right of the frame. Finally, the camera continues forward, revealing further crumbling architecture as the character traverses the desolate, root-choked ruins.
